body.title: Day-close rearranges slate Done section to top for future CC readability
body.text:
# D-slate-done-first-2026-05-07
**title:** Day-close rearranges slate Done section to top for future CC readability
**date:** 2026-05-07
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-slate-done-first-ordering

## Decision narrative
Old slates should be optimized for future CC reading. Done-first ordering answers "what shipped?" immediately. Day-close step 3 rearranges sections at close-time: Done today → Notes → Decided/Ticketed → everything else. Does not affect intra-day slate order.

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
